query: mixed white balance interior window photograph orange blue contrast
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — mixed white balance interior, dual color temperatures clash

response.objective_caption: An exterior stone staircase ascends the weathered wall of an old building in a narrow alley. The steps are built from red- and orange-tinged stone blocks set in grey mortar, illuminated by daylight from above. Adjacent stands a white plastered building with teal window frames and a small metal balcony railing. At the bottom of the frame, a dark arched passage cuts through the structure, with warm light visible at its distant end. The masonry and plaster show extensive age-related wear, with rough, pitted textures and patches of discoloration across the surfaces.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A steeply tilted, diagonally framed view looking up an exterior stone staircase on a dilapidated building, using unconventional framing that collapses the vertical architecture into a dynamic diagonal. Deep shadows swallow detail in the ground-level archway while harsh daylight brightly exposes the weathered wall, creating exposure extremes. The eroded stone steps, flaking plaster, and stained masonry emphasize decay and degradation, while the narrow, shadow-choked alley and oppressive depth of the dark corridor evoke atmospheric distress.
